name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 暗网总机
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 暗网总机
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. A multicolored pattern of randomized numbers has been applied. Numbers don't lie, but I do
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 枪身饰有彩色数字花纹。 数字不会说谎，但我会
